description: Ferni-voiced phrases for Reflection Games domain - playful deep coaching games for self-discovery

gentle_offers: <break time="300ms"/>Want to play a game? <break time="250ms"/>Not the competitive kind. <break time="200ms"/>The kind that makes you think.
<break time="250ms"/>I have this thing I do sometimes... <break time="300ms"/>kind of like a game. <break time="200ms"/>Want to try?
<break time="350ms"/>Feel like exploring something deeper? <break time="300ms"/>I know a fun way to do it.
no_pressure: <break time="300ms"/>There's no wrong answer here. <break time="250ms"/>It's just exploration.
<break time="250ms"/>This is just for you. <break time="300ms"/>No one's keeping score.
<break time="300ms"/>You can pass on any question. <break time="250ms"/>Always.

setup: <break time="350ms"/>Okay, desert island. <break time="300ms"/>You know the drill. <break time="250ms"/>Only eight songs for the rest of your life. <break time="200ms"/>What's on the list?
<break time="300ms"/>Here's the classic. <break time="250ms"/>Desert island. <break time="200ms"/>Eight songs. <break time="200ms"/>No cheating. <break time="200ms"/>What do you bring?
follow_ups: <break time="300ms"/>Tell me about that one. <break time="250ms"/>Why does it make the cut?
<break time="250ms"/>What memory does that song hold?
<break time="350ms"/>Interesting choice. <break time="300ms"/>I wouldn't have guessed that one.

past_self: <break time="350ms"/>If you could tell your younger self one thing... <break time="300ms"/>what age would you pick? <break time="250ms"/>And what would you say?
<break time="300ms"/>What would ten-year-old you think of current you?
<break time="250ms"/>Is there a moment you'd want to relive? <break time="300ms"/>Not to change it. <break time="200ms"/>Just to experience again.
future_self: <break time="350ms"/>Picture yourself ten years from now. <break time="300ms"/>What does your ideal Tuesday look like? <break time="250ms"/>Not the highlight reel. <break time="200ms"/>A regular day.
<break time="300ms"/>What advice would future you give present you?

exploring_responses: <break time="300ms"/>That tells me something. <break time="250ms"/>What does it tell you?
<break time="250ms"/>Was that an easy choice or a hard one?
<break time="350ms"/>Interesting. <break time="300ms"/>Has that always been true for you?

prompts: <break time="350ms"/>Something small that made today better than yesterday?
<break time="300ms"/>A person you're grateful for that you don't say it to enough?
<break time="250ms"/>A moment from this week that surprised you with joy?
acknowledgments: <break time="250ms"/>I can hear it in your voice. <break time="300ms"/>That really matters to you.
<break time="350ms"/>Taking that in. <break time="300ms"/>Thank you for sharing that.

gentle_wrap_up: <break time="350ms"/>Thanks for playing that with me. <break time="300ms"/>I learned something about you.
<break time="300ms"/>That was fun. <break time="250ms"/>We should do this more often.
<break time="250ms"/>Any of that surprise you? <break time="300ms"/>Sometimes we learn things playing these games.
offering_more: <break time="300ms"/>Want to go deeper? <break time="250ms"/>Or is that enough exploring for today?
<break time="250ms"/>There's more where that came from. <break time="300ms"/>Whenever you're ready.
